title: Efficacy and safety of semaglutide on weight loss in obese or overweight patients without diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
authors: Xueqin Gao; Xiaoli Hua; Xu Wang; Wanbin Xu; Yu Zhang; Chen Shi; Ming Gu
inclusion_reason: Supporting source: synthesized RCT evidence for semaglutide-associated weight loss in adults with overweight or obesity without diabetes.
population: Adults with obesity or overweight without diabetes
outcome_notes: Body weight; BMI; waist circumference; categorical weight-loss thresholds; safety outcomes
notes: Open access publisher PDF under Creative Commons Attribution License (CC BY); legally usable with attribution.

title: Two-year effects of semaglutide in adults with overweight or obesity: the STEP 5 trial
authors: W. Timothy Garvey; Rachel L. Batterham; Meena Bhatta; Silvio Buscemi; Louise N. Christensen; Juan P. Frias; Esteban Jodar; Kristian Kandler; Georgia Rigas; Thomas A. Wadden; Sean Wharton; STEP 5 Study Group
inclusion_reason: Supporting source: long-term randomized trial evidence for sustained weight loss with continued semaglutide treatment.
population: Adults with obesity or overweight with at least one weight-related comorbidity and without diabetes
intervention: Once-weekly subcutaneous semaglutide 2.4 mg plus behavioral intervention
outcome_notes: Two-year percentage body weight change; achievement of at least 5 percent weight loss; waist circumference; cardiometabolic outcomes; adverse events
notes: Open access publisher PDF under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License; legally usable with attribution.

title: Long-term weight loss effects of semaglutide in obesity without diabetes in the SELECT trial
authors: Donna H. Ryan; Ildiko Lingvay; John Deanfield; Steven E. Kahn; Eric Barros; Bartolome Burguera; Helen M. Colhoun; Cintia Cercato; Dror Dicker; Deborah B. Horn; G. Kees Hovingh; Ole Kleist Jeppesen; Alexander Kokkinos; A. Michael Lincoff; Sebastian M. Meyhofer; Tugce Kalayci Oral; Jorge Plutzky; Andre P. van Beek; John P. H. Wilding; Robert F. Kushner
inclusion_reason: Supporting source: long-term SELECT trial weight and anthropometric outcomes in adults without diabetes.
population: Adults with overweight or obesity and preexisting cardiovascular disease without diabetes
outcome_notes: Long-term body weight change; waist circumference; waist-to-height ratio; BMI-category changes; safety and discontinuation
notes: Open access publisher PDF under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License; legally usable with attribution.
